parser_fallback_reason: MinerU CLI not found on PATH
messages: 当前文档属于高风险版面，MinerU 更适合处理。 风险标记：multi_column_or_fragmented_layout。 如未安装 MinerU，可先参考官方仓库的 Local Deployment / Online Experience 说明。
MinerU local 不可用，已自动回退到 PyMuPDF 轻量解析链路。 原因：MinerU CLI not found on PATH
notes: raw.md is the direct extracted layer
clean.md is the cleaned reading layer
chunks.json is the LLM working layer
original PDF remains the truth source for quotes, pages, equations, tables, and figure captions
